examples: This is the light bronzer, for pale to light skin.
Subtle bronzer was key to help add warmth to her skin.
Now, if you'll excuse me, I have to find my wig and bronzer.
And so it was that thigh-high glittering golden boots and body bronzer were brought to the table and a beautiful woman draped herself among some African shrubbery.
At the height of the metrosexual phenomenon, Jean Paul Gaultier launched a line of makeup for men which included a concealer, an eyeliner, a brow pencil and a bronzer.
